title: ASR Outdoor Thumb Assisted Folding Knife Belt Clip Seat Belt Cutter Window Punch
description:
Be prepared on the go with the ASR Outdoor 5" Thumb Assisted Folding Knife! This knife features a 3.5" blade, and extends to an overall length of 8.25" when unfolded. Once folded, the knife with handle is just 5" in length, making it easy to bring with you just about anywhere. The blade is constructed of durable 440 stainless steel, and the handle comes with a belt clip, seat belt cutter and window punch in case of an emergency situation. Make sure you keep one of these in your car, backpack, boat or camping gear at all times!
